name: Late GST Allocation Relief

eligibility.description: Requires demonstrating intent to have the lowest possible inclusion ratio and requesting relief under Treasury regulations.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows taxpayers to request an extension of time to allocate GST exemption or to use 'substantial compliance' to treat a flawed allocation as valid if the intent to have a zero inclusion ratio is clear.
